backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend canister with data types and CRUD methods for daily sales entries (stored in a Map) and purchase entries (stored in a List), supporting save, get, and filter-by-date/week/month operations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (ERP sidebar layout, dashboard daily report, and others) to their associated source files, UI components, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-line summaries of key frontend files including the HTML entry point, TypeScript globals, PDF/Excel export utilities, the Export Reports page, and the root App component.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, sidebar, chart colors, etc.) using the oklch color space.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app that loads jsPDF, jsPDF-AutoTable, and SheetJS via CDN script tags before mounting the React root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that manages active navigation state, renders the appropriate page component via a switch, and seeds sample daily and purchase data to both localStorage and the backend canister on first load.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: ERP-style layout component rendering a fixed navy-blue sidebar with five navigation items (Dashboard, Weekly, Monthly, Purchase & Stock, Export Reports) and a main content area, with active section highlighting.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom React hook and context provider for Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status, built on top of the DFINITY AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating daily, weekly, monthly sales entries and purchase data, with localStorage persistence as a fallback cache.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a Navy ERP theme with CSS custom properties for light/dark modes plus reusable component classes like erp-table and erp-input.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Daily sales entry dashboard page that lets users select a date, edit per-salesman row data with inline validation, and save entries to the backend and localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/ExportReportsPage.tsx: Report export page that allows users to select daily, weekly, monthly, or stock report types and download them as PDF or Excel files using dedicated export utilities.
frontend/src/pages/MonthlyReportPage.tsx: Monthly report page that aggregates sales entries per salesman for a selected month/year, displaying totals for bills, sales value, day sales, and days worked in a summary table.
frontend/src/pages/PurchaseStockPage.tsx: React page for recording stock purchases, with a form for product name, date, quantity, and rate, plus a summary table aggregating total purchased quantity, value, and average rate per product.
frontend/src/pages/WeeklyReportPage.tsx: React page displaying a weekly sales report table for all salesmen, with week navigation and grand totals, fetching data via a custom query hook.
frontend/src/types/globals.d.ts: TypeScript ambient declarations for CDN-loaded jsPDF (with autoTable) and SheetJS (XLSX) libraries, extending the Window interface to expose them globally.
frontend/src/utils/beatSchedule.ts: Defines the weekly beat (sales area) schedule for six salesmen and exports a helper function to look up a salesman's beat by day of week.
frontend/src/utils/exportExcel.ts: Utility functions that use the SheetJS XLSX library to export daily, weekly, and monthly sales data—as well as purchase data—to formatted .xlsx files.
frontend/src/utils/exportPDF.ts: Utility functions that use jsPDF with autoTable to generate styled PDF reports (with header, footer, and totals rows) for daily, weekly, monthly, and purchase data.
frontend/src/utils/formatCurrency.ts: Exports two helpers: formatIndianCurrency formats a number as an INR currency string (₹), and formatIndianNumber formats a number using Indian locale grouping.
frontend/src/utils/sampleData.ts: Generates randomized sample DailySalesEntry records for the past 14 non-Sunday days across all salesmen, and a fixed set of sample PurchaseEntry records for testing.
frontend/src/utils/validation.ts: Exports validation functions for form fields (load number, total bills, sales value, stock qty, product name, quantity, purchase rate), each returning a ValidationResult with a valid flag and optional error message.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration enabling dark mode, custom color tokens (using oklch CSS variables), extended font families, border radius, box shadows, and accordion keyframe animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the Sales Report Manager app's architecture, features, salesman beat schedules, known issues, and tech stack (React, Tailwind, localStorage, date-fns, jsPDF, SheetJS) at schema version 1.0.0.
